title: nasturtium foliosum
intro: Nasturtium foliosum, also known as watercress or broad-leaved cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is used as a food and has medicinal properties, with its leaves and stems containing compounds like isothiocyanates, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of nasturtium foliosum include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often consumed fresh in salads, sandwiches, and as a garnish.
